hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -10 | tr '\n' ' '); printf '{"additionalContext": "Staged files pending commit: %s. Commit them now following the git skill convention (never add a co-author line)."}\n' "$FILES"; exit 2; fi
